stemHtml: The radio frequency spectrum contains several bands. Which of the following statements is completely correct about the band normally used for the Aeronautical Mobile Service voice communications?

options.a: It is immediately below the UHF band and its frequencies are measured in kHz.
options.b: It is situated two bands below the SHF band and its frequencies are measured in kHz.
options.c: It is immediately above the MF band and its frequencies are measured in MHz.
options.d: The band just below UHF and it includes 288 MHz.
